message:
perf(vfx): hoist quality/step branches outside hot pixel loops

Plasma: match on FxQuality before the outer y-loop instead of checking
per-pixel. Each quality level gets its own dedicated loop body, avoiding
branch overhead in the innermost loop. Minimal no longer computes
row_offset since it doesn't index into radial/interference tables.

Metaballs: hoist the step==1 check outside the entire y-loop. The
step==1 path iterates all balls with enumerate(); the step>1 path uses
active_indices. Shared glow/threshold/color logic extracted into a
paint_pixel! macro to avoid duplicating that across both branches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
